case_title: DONKOR, GEORGE VS COSENTINO, PETER et al

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-13-2000, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COSENTINO, PETER
DEF'S CORRESPONDENCE RE: REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE FORWARDED TO 506;
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT COSENTINO, PETER HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONKOR, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSENTINO, PETER GAEHWILER PROPERTIES $505.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $553.00, PETER COSENTINO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS A DEFENDANT AND IS REPLCAED BY GAEHWILER PROPERTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DONKOR, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSENTINO, PETER GAEHWILER PROPERTIES $602.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GAEHWILER PROPERTIES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,402.00 FILED BY DONKOR, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT COSENTINO, PETER GAEHWILER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
